auditor: Chartered Professional Accountants, Licensed Public Accountants
one_time_description: Write down of tangible capital assets (First Nation housing)
economic_notes: Ontario First Nation Limited Partnership (OFNLP) distributions of $1,775,982 received. Wataynikaneyap Power LP deferred revenue of $19,474. COVID-19 noted as impacting operations with additional funding received for wages and health and safety costs.
notes: Audit is qualified due to incomplete tangible capital asset inventory - First Nation has not fully adopted PSAB Section 3150 requirements. Long-term debt includes $8,707,895 in loans/mortgages plus $463,356 in capital lease obligations totalling $9,171,251. Two consolidated subsidiaries: Eabametoong First Nation Housing Authority Inc. and Eabametoong Communications Inc. Auditor firm name not explicitly stated beyond 'Chartered Professional Accountants, Licensed Public Accountants' based in Thunder Bay, Ontario. ISC funding recognized as revenue per deferred revenue note is $20,163,891; total federal transfers recognized $26,774,542; total provincial transfers recognized $5,385,998; total government transfers = $32,160,540. OSR includes OFNLP distributions $1,775,982, other revenue $7,295,096, trust fund interest $1,234, replacement reserve $68,055 = $9,140,367. Annual debt service reflects long-term debt repayments only; capital lease payments were $236,585 additional.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
